popup-03.description: Container color on/over layer-02 with even higher elevation

inverse.description: High contrast backgrounds;     High contrast elements

emphasis.description: Headers;hover text color for default. old - {ref.color.neutral.700}

placeholder.description: color for placeholder text before input

on-color.description: Icons on interactive or colored bgs;

00.description: A field is considered a layer on top of the background it is placed on, for example a field placed on a $layer-00 aka base background will use $field-00

01.description: A field is considered a layer on top of the background it is placed on, for example a field placed on a $layer-01 aka a card background will use $field-01

02.description: A field is considered a layer on top of the background it is placed on, for example a field placed on a $layer-02 aka an elevated card background will use $field-02

03.description: A field is considered a layer on top of the background it is placed on, for example a field placed on a $layer-03 aka an elevated card background will use $field-03

50.description: DM - High Contrast Text; LM - BG 0 (Canvas); Light Border

100.description: DM - Default Text,focus ring; LM -seperator, border

600.description: DM-  elevated cards tooltips; LM - default text

700.description: DM-  bg 1 (cards on canvas) LM - High Contrast Text
